title: ranunculus auricomus subsp. nothus
intro: Ranunculus auricomus subsp. nothus is a subspecies of the Greater Spearwort plant, a type of flowering plant in the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are said to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Ranunculus auricomus subsp. nothus include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to support the immune system and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used externally or internally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
